goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should be in the 'east'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 10:30'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'london kings cross'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4
The hotel should be in the east
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 3 nights starting from thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 10:30
The train should leave on sunday and should go to london kings cross
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
